stem: The function g is defined by g(x) = −4x + 50. What is the value of g(x) when x = −7?
rationale:
Choice A is correct. g(−7) = −4(−7) + 50 = 28 + 50 = 78.

Choice B results from a sign error on the product (−28 + 50). Choice C results from subtracting 4 from 50. Choice D is the negation of the correct value.
